final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: aerial drone photograph, cinematic still
Primary request: bird's-eye drone shot of a modern international metropolis core business district at night, long-exposure effect
Scene/backdrop: dense skyline of a major city at night; in the distance a harbor with a massive cruise ship docked; neon advertisement billboards illuminating the sky
Subject: countless skyscrapers with glass curtain-wall facades flickering in multicolored lights; elevated highways with red and white light trails from traffic flowing like veins through the city; a landmark supertall tower at the center of the frame with rooftop searchlights sweeping the night sky
Style/medium: cyberpunk-styled color grading, photorealistic drone photography, long-exposure light trails
Composition/framing: extreme high-altitude top-down aerial perspective, wide-angle drone lens, deep depth of field showing entire city grid
Lighting/mood: high-contrast cyberpunk night; dominant blue-violet tones; neon multicolor glow from billboards and building facades; red and white streaking car light trails; searchlight beams cutting through the sky; dramatic and electric atmosphere
Color palette: deep blue-violet as dominant base, electric cyan and magenta neon accents, warm amber and white light trails, vivid multicolor billboard reflections
Materials/textures: reflective glass curtain walls with grid patterns, wet asphalt reflecting neon, dark ocean water in harbor with ship lights
Constraints: maintain extreme high-altitude overhead viewpoint; supertall landmark tower must be centered; long-exposure light trails on highways must be visible; harbor and cruise ship must appear in the distance
Avoid: daytime lighting, flat low-contrast tones, missing light trails, ground-level perspective
